title: v0.6.0 successor current-state snapshot
status: Ready for tag and publication after #258 release PR merges and CI passes.
appIdea: A local-first installable browser PWA for Vietnamese/English dictation, vocabulary steering, guided voice enrollment, browser-side personal-model training, encrypted voice-model portability, offline use, and privacy-preserving diagnostics.

workflowSummary.dictate: Immediate task surface with in-place model setup, hold-to-speak recording, editable transcript, hidden low-frequency actions, and disclosed technical details.
workflowSummary.vocabulary: Compact set list and editor with Advanced disclosure for steering/tokenization details.
workflowSummary.models: Compact model list, model detail accordions, create/enroll/train/results/import/export routes, and storage/deletion controls.
workflowSummary.enrollment: One prompt at a time with safe Whisper/Normal/Loud labels and concise recovery feedback.
workflowSummary.training: Blocker-first readiness plus Preparing/Training/Checking/Ready progress with technical details disclosed.
workflowSummary.portability: Dedicated encrypted .speechmodel import/export routes with worker-owned validation/crypto/archive handling.
workflowSummary.settingsStoragePrivacyDiagnostics: Dedicated app-menu screens keep low-frequency data-management, privacy, shortcuts, dense diagnostics, and About content outside primary task flows.

contracts.inference: Existing ASR worker, decoder, formatter, stable-prefix, finalization, WebGPU/WASM fallback, and mock model CI contracts remain intact.
contracts.personalization: Enrollment, quality analysis, profile storage, adapter training prototype, evaluation, activation, rollback, and multi-profile contracts remain intact.
contracts.portability: Encrypted portable model envelope, manifest, hostile-file import validation, exact compatibility, and worker-owned archive/crypto contracts remain intact.
contracts.privacySecurity: No telemetry, no accounts, local-first data, redacted diagnostics, safe links/return targets, no private artifacts in committed evidence.

schemas.uiPreferencesV1: Additive UI-only storage at speech:ui-preferences:v1; excluded from .speechmodel exports.
schemas.coreDomainSchemas: Model manifest, profile manifest, vocabulary, portable model, training jobs, feature shards, and worker protocols remain compatible with v0.5 domain data.

blockedOrAcceptedLimitations: Issue #255 remains open for release-usability participant evidence; the user explicitly approved publishing v0.6.0 while keeping this gate open.
ADR 0004 and ADR 0005 still block production accuracy and reference-hardware performance claims.
Manual Windows/macOS assistive-technology rows remain accepted limitations until run outside the Linux agent environment.
instructionsForNextPlanningAgent: Use docs/planning/CURRENT_STATE.json as the cumulative current state.
Plan only the user's next requested delta instead of re-planning v0.6.0.
Do not close #255 unless aggregate participant evidence or a separate explicit human decision updates docs/research/v0.6-release-usability-study.json.
After any future delta, write another successor snapshot with privacy-safe aggregate evidence only.
